content.observe: If you can guarantee at least one of the four conditions never holds, deadlock becomes structurally impossible here.
content.fault: You're still allowing hold-and-wait. A process is holding one resource while blocking indefinitely on another.

log: [alloc] P1 requests R1 and R2 simultaneously (all-or-nothing)
[alloc] R1 available, R2 available: grant both atomically
[alloc] P2 requests R1 and R2 simultaneously (all-or-nothing)
[alloc] R1 held by P1: request denied, P2 holds nothing, no wait
